reasoning: A concierge workflow is build-ready, but a self-serve product should wait until paid demand and rule accuracy are proven.
known: GPT Image 2 supports image input and output plus image editing endpoints.
Amazon image rules provide a bounded first compliance checklist.
The first version can be delivered manually with a folder, prompt templates, and human review.
assumed: Sellers will tolerate human-reviewed delivery within 24 hours.
A compliance checklist is valuable enough to differentiate from generic AI image generation.
Image outputs can preserve product fidelity when prompted and reviewed carefully.
toValidate: Measure generation cost and revision time per SKU.
Check product fidelity across reflective, transparent, apparel, food, and electronics categories.
Define what claims and lifestyle scenes are unsafe or misleading.
Confirm whether sellers need API automation or just a reliable service.
concerns: Product hallucination is the main trust risk.
Marketplace compliance must be checked by humans until rule tests are reliable.
Using customer product images creates privacy and IP handling requirements.
nextSteps: Create a concierge intake form for product photo, SKU link, platform, image goals, and constraints.
Build prompt templates for Amazon main image, secondary detail images, and lifestyle/ad variants.
Create a human review checklist for product fidelity, rule compliance, and misleading claims.
Track cost, latency, pass/fail, and revisions per generated image.

mvpScope.smallestPromise: Deliver one Amazon-ready SKU image pack from one raw product photo.
mvpScope.manualFallback: Human designer/operator edits outputs before delivery.

prd.scenario: seller is launching or refreshing a SKU and needs compliant images quickly
userFlow: submit product photo and listing context
acceptanceCriteria: main image follows Amazon white-background rule checklist
secondary images do not misrepresent product quantity, size, or features
delivery includes source prompts and compliance notes

techStack.productSurface: manual service plus lightweight web intake
techStack.recommendedStack: Static landing page + form + cloud storage + GPT Image 2 API + manual review checklist
techStack.paymentProvider: Stripe for international sellers; WeChat/Alipay if China seller test starts
techStack.rationale: Avoid building editor software before paid demand and image-quality constraints are proven.

aiNativeCheck.aiRole: Generate and edit product image variants from raw product photos and platform-specific prompts.
aiNativeCheck.aiNecessity: AI is useful for speed and variant creation; human review remains required for product fidelity and policy compliance.

humanReviewThresholds: all customer-facing outputs reviewed before delivery
regressionChecks: product shape, color, logo, quantity, packaging, and claim preservation

aiNativeCheck.moatHypothesis: A growing library of marketplace-specific prompts, rejection cases, and reviewed before/after examples.

handoffSummary.summary: Launch a manual paid SKU-pack test with 3 demos and direct seller outreach; do not build multi-platform SaaS yet.
